revision.text: {{<includeonly>safesubst:</includeonly>CURRENTYEAR}}<noinclude> {{Documentation|link box=off|content=This template exists for people who use incorrect capitalization of the [[Help:Magic words|magic word]] <nowiki>{{CURRENTYEAR}}</nowiki>. The magic word should be used in preference to this template. ==See also== *{{Tl|Year needed}}}} [[Category:Wikipedia magic word templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Currentyear here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Currentyear for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{<includeonly>safesubst:</includeonly>CURRENTYEAR}}<noinclude> {{Documentation|link box=off|content=This template exists for people who use incorrect capitalization of the [[Help:Magic words|magic word]] <nowiki>{{CURRENTYEAR}}</nowiki>.
